nodes.name: Podargiformes
nodes.summary: Podargiformes（Podargiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Solomons frogmouth、茶色蟆口鴟、Marbled frogmouth等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 蟆口鸱科
nodes.summary: 蟆口鸱科（Podargidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Solomons frogmouth、茶色蟆口鴟、Marbled frogmouth等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: 菲律宾蛙嘴夜鹰
nodes.summary: 菲律宾蛙嘴夜鹰（Batrachostomus septimus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如菲律宾蛙口夜鹰。

nodes.name: 菲律宾蛙口夜鹰
nodes.summary: 菲律宾蛙口夜鹰（Philippine frogmouth，学名 Batrachostomus septimus），分类上属于Podargiformes，并归入蟆口鸱科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、森林砍伐。
nodes.shortSummary: 菲律宾蛙嘴夜鹰（学名：Batrachostomus septimus）是一种夜鸟，在整个菲律宾群岛都可以找到，通常生活在低地森林。目前对于这种鸟知之甚少，因为它们仅在牙尖活动并且不发出任何叫声。它们以蝗虫、蝉、蟋蟀和甲虫为食。 繁殖 它们在距离地面2-5米的水平的树枝上筑巢，使…

nodes.name: 亚洲蟆口鸱属
nodes.summary: 亚洲蟆口鸱属（Batrachostomus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联12种鸟类，如Large frogmouth、Dulit frogmouth、菲律宾蛙口夜鹰等12种鸟类。

nodes.name: 动物界
nodes.summary: 动物界（Animalia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Philippine frogmouth is currently listed as species of least concern by the IUCN as of 2012, though it is believed its population is slowly declining due to habitat destruction

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The reason for this listing is the large range, the rate of decline not reaching the threshold to qualify as a vulnerable species, and while the population size has not been officially quantified, it is believed to exceed the threshold to be considered vulnerable based on the population size criterion. Occurs in a few protected areas in Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and Bataan National Park on Luzon, Northwest Panay Peninsula Natural Park, Balinsasayao Twin Lakes Natural Park, Northern Negros Natural Park in West Visayas, Pasonanca Natural Park, Mount Kitanglad and Mount Apo in Mindanao, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The reason for this listing is the large range, the rate of decline not reaching the threshold to qualify as a vulnerable species, and while the population size has not been officially quantified, it is believed to exceed the threshold to be considered vulnerable based on the population size criterion. Occurs in a few protected areas in Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park and Bataan National Park on Luzon, Northwest Panay Peninsula Natural Park, Balinsasayao Twin Lakes Natural Park, Northern Negros Natural Park in West Visayas, Pasonanca Natural Park, Mount Kitanglad and Mount Apo in Mindanao, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax
